title: Close the M4 core vertical slice gate
summary: Close M4 after scenario, architecture, implementation, save/replay, Worker parity, benchmarks and invariants are verified and integrated, then write a non-executable future M5 entry prompt.
acceptance: All M4 task packets WM-0062 through WM-0070 are verified integrated and done before closeout completion
Closeout report records final M4 scenario hashes artifact paths benchmark comparison Worker parity save/replay evidence M0-M3 regression status residual risks and known warnings
Future M5 entry prompt is written to coordination/reports/WM-0071-future-m5-entry-prompt.md as a non-executable handoff artifact for a later reviewed M5 planning task
The borrowed-shadow lamp rule-discovery gate passes with structured Chronicle evidence obligations crisis-chain and dawn-review explanations
Roadmap milestone and project-state status are updated narrowly to reflect M4 closeout evidence
No M5 task is created promoted claimed or implemented by this closeout task and the future prompt explicitly says it must not be executed as part of WM-0071

history.details: Created by WM-0061 M4 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
Closed M4 evidence package and future M5 non-executable prompt; required closeout gates pass.

verified: No blocking findings. Confirmed WM-0062 through WM-0070 are done with verified reviews; WM-0071 changes are limited to allowed M4 closeout roadmap/project-state/report/task/inbox files; no WM-0072 or M5 task exists. Closeout evidence matches artifacts and rerun gates pass. Reviewer pnpm bench temp run passed with a non-blocking M4 warning at 10.69% over baseline, below the 20% blocking threshold and with no invariant mismatches.
Integrated reviewed M4 closeout evidence and non-executable future M5 prompt; M5 remains unstarted.

objective: Close M4 with reviewed evidence and write a future M5 entry prompt while keeping M5 blocked until a later reviewed planning task.
forbiddenPaths: M5 task DAG creation promotion claim or implementation
M5 runtime product planning beyond the non-executable future entry prompt artifact
benchmarkImpact: Final M4 benchmark artifact comparison and gate verdict; no threshold changes.
reviewRouting: Project-director completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies closeout evidence, future M5 prompt content and M5-unstarted status before any integration. Integration and done remain separate taskctl steps after reviewer verification.
rollbackModel: Leave M4 open, revert the closeout report and future M5 prompt artifact, do not promote M5, and route blockers to the responsible owner task.
ownerGate: Do not fix product code in closeout
Confirm every upstream M4 task is verified integrated and done
Record hashes artifacts warnings residual risks and exact checks
Write the future M5 entry prompt as a non-executable handoff artifact only
Do not create promote claim or implement M5 work

sparkEligibility.reason: Milestone closeout and final coordination gates cannot be assigned to Spark.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Closeout evidence matches artifacts and rerun gates pass. Reviewer pnpm bench temp run passed with a non-blocking M4 warning at 10.69% over baseline, below the 20% blocking threshold and with no invariant mismatches.

integration.summary: Integrated reviewed M4 closeout evidence and non-executable future M5 prompt; M5 remains unstarted.
